violations.text: Packaged foods are lacking all required information on food label. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/16/2024

Mac n cheese and pastries packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. -Shrimp chowder in the self service hot holding area is lacking a list of ingredients and major allergen in food. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2023
